textByHash.e08c1932db56db6d5275ac1cc588f8f8a39f27e4: Who disturbs the rocks of Zekin?
textByHash.76f114e59684c0ceaf1f93b57812ff650abd5b3a: So, you desire the sacred water that flows here?
textByHash.a31cfe604009530702423d5996ffa9b115aa7484: The water babbles so loudly and I am already so tortured. I cannot abide the sound, so I have stoppered the streams. Care you not for my torment and pain?
textByHash.ac0866a063b5c3b46890796f402976b67fe521d2: The rock must remain! I placed it there to stop the sound of the water's babbling. The noise troubles my soul and I seek a little rest... rest from this terrible torture...
textByHash.e2522768654db9e64dc1d8bd37a4a42f275477a3: I was robbed of my life by a cruel man named Viyeldi. For centuries I have searched for him, so I might enact my vengeance.
textByHash.54b239fb5a42aa3a4b29b708fe3840cfd1f30c90: But, oh! Tragedy of tragedies, while searching for the source of the sacred water, his spirit became trapped! Now he is neither living nor dead, and I will never be released from my torment.
textByHash.61770662480217bf692e5075c6b8bdff83478d03: I was brutally murdered by a vicious man called Viyeldi. I sense his presence nearby.
textByHash.661c043a99a619c795c12aeab41f43acb44355d5: My spirit burns with the need for revenge. While that fiend yet lives, I cannot rest. If you seek the sacred water, you must ensure he meets his end.
textByHash.de2da883cfc21974560bba82b75272b95ed22e68: If you refuse, then I swear, the sacred water shall never flow again! Will you put an end to Viyeldi for me?
textByHash.6f03e1db7ca6c83fe61eef673c4bbda33c1d81be: Destroy Viyeldi, and the sacred water is yours. But beware, for this is no simple task.
textByHash.166fd0ad9d61462c4c491a2f422df8b7053aeb45: I will furnish you with a weapon which will destroy Viyeldi for good. Here, take this.
textByHash.95897e72cac399881b06e976e0a14cf4006643a8: To complete your task you must use this weapon on Viyeldi.
textByHash.e506db6b3cd1fca2624cc95e6cd62102ad144df3: Use this dagger to slay the fiendish Viyeldi, and bring it back to me once he is dead... for good, this time.
textByHash.bccf54a57167ff2ba07039098b444afd7c587667: You've made the right decision. Soon, the sacred water will be yours. Bring the dagger back to me when you have completed your task.
textByHash.99660f47ba7c76c0a9f09c4fa0f1837fbd259ca1: That's your decision. Are you sure you don't need the sacred water, though? Deny me, and it will forever be out of your reach...
textByHash.2c4da4a4ef3d903e6e7f0f996dda5310f8ceb3dc: A noble sentiment, but Viyeldi is not alive! He is merely a vessel for the sacred water's power.
textByHash.15e30201033f74491b65740ffcde697396e7ef5e: If that is your decision then so be it, but I cannot allow access to the stream until Viyeldi is dead.
textByHash.e246911da1220bec1e8745d464eb9bc8511f029e: First, you must help me. Revenge is the only thing that keeps my spirit in this place.
textByHash.cc13c7810d841ab07eff894a021b689e504f91f0: Help me take vengeance on Viyeldi and I will gladly remove the rocks and allow you access to the water. What say you, adventurer?
textByHash.85323a94890d713d2976849fd3dceedcebb5a7a6: I am Echned Zekin, and I seek peace from my eternal torture...
textByHash.1937208d5428f252babdced262663987f78faff5: I am long since dead and buried, lost in the passages of time. My kin have departed and I am forgotten by all who knew me... so it is unlikely that you were one of them. I am but a poor tortured soul, trying to get
textByHash.1f45f024d4e91114f2febd55b13e590cf389260d: Why do you return when your task is still incomplete?
textByHash.0defab201ccd1bc57f29e7a4a5b6dd94bcdf851b: I seek revenge on Viyeldi, the cruel fiend who slew me centuries ago.
textByHash.4a74784e045fc49b70535ddfc0fa4917ec2ab414: I sense he is nearby. Kill him, and I will grant you access to the sacred water.
textByHash.55acd70df34d03c8a6e4170547849ee83c8e03b2: It is too late for second thoughts... do as you promised and return to me, with haste! Viyeldi's presence torments me so...
textByHash.8566927b751a9c06d405a99c6227406ca9dececb: Return the dagger to me when your task is complete.
textByHash.4addd485012f454da4aad8e85a0b509e29192d52: Does this mean you do not wish to help me take vengeance on Viyeldi?
textByHash.2494348bb10a4e05ce9a40776927a99a5df1f2c2: Very well, I respect your decision - but I cannot allow you to access the sacred water while my tormentor lives.
textByHash.0a60a139ac6db510195a56f4ea5ba718d3c23d80: Very well, return to me when it is done.
textByHash.18105b6fe08beac6461df8000b6af11da8f6e58c: You seem filled with determination. Have you slain Viyeldi? Give me the dagger, quickly!
textByHash.ed41ce0aedce9c2817c145eaee686fb0d700af0f: Bring it to me with all haste, or feel my wrath!
textByHash.185497c0cc001bdfed23c99fea38217496a99283: Go now and slay him, as you agreed. Unless you'd like me to take vengeance on you, instead?
textByHash.ad8a74321e0d8696be024febf51c98875d7b647e: Worthless Vacu! How dare you lie to me! Go and slay Viyeldi, as you promised, or I will lay upon you all the pain and torment I have endured these long years!
textByHash.68630eb0e7810276395209cf1dcaa4e08d4a563b: Aha, I see you have completed your task. I'll take that dagger from you now.
textByHash.063d3443cfcf23c712ddb8e8fa4391ea0da1169b: Ahhhhh, yes... I feel my power returning. Now, to deal with thee...
textByHash.523035062c7566b6345255803158d55f35e62e65: Foolish Vacu! Thou hast fallen for my tricks...
textByHash.dd6259370934b383c107c4d371e25fe0ffd6f794: Now, look upon my true face... and know thy doom!
